product: Genie Code now supports auto-approve for tool actions ​
tagline: June 4, 2026 Genie Code now offers an auto approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request.
what_it_does: June 4, 2026 Genie Code now offers an auto approve mode that approves tool actions, like running code or editing notebooks, without prompting you for each request. An AI classifier reviews each action and blocks risky ones.
why_it_matters: Auto approve is a productivity feature, not a security boundary.

capabilities.title: June 4, 2026 Genie
